content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.productivity.quick_notes
FILE: cosmos/tools/productivity/quick_notes.py (203 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Quick Notes - Fast Note-Taking Utility

"Taking notes so you don't have to remember everything!"

Features:
- Quick capture with timestamps
- Tag-based organization
- Markdown support
- Search and filter
- Export to various formats

CLASSES:
- Note: A quick note entry.
  Methods: def matches(self, query: str) -> bool
- QuickNotes: Fast note-taking manager.
  Methods: def add(self, content: str, tags: List[str]=None) -> Note
  Methods: def update(self, note_id: str, content: str=None, tags: List[str]=None) -> Optional[Note]
  Methods: def delete(self, note_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def archive(self, note_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def pin(self, note_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def search(self, query: str, include_archived: bool=False) -> List[Note]
  Methods: def list_by_tag(self, tag: str) -> List[Note]
  Methods: def list_recent(self, limit: int=10) -> List[Note]
